properties.name: telegram.locale.default-locale
properties.description: Default locale for the application, used when no specific locale is set for a user or notification.

properties.name: telegram.locale.overrides
properties.description: Map of locale overrides for specific users, where key is the user's identifier and value is the locale to be used for that user.

properties.name: telegram.notification.scheduler.daily-message-stats-cron
properties.description: Cron for scheduling daily Telegram notifications with per-chat non-command message statistics.

properties.name: app.day.start-hour
properties.description: Start hour for a specific day.

properties.name: app.reputation.fixed-reputations
properties.description: Map of fixed reputations for specific users, where key is the user's identifier and value is the fixed reputation score.

properties.name: ingestion.stratz.scheduler.match-update-cron
properties.description: Cron for scheduling Stratz match updates.

properties.name: ingestion.stratz.scheduler.player-update-cron
properties.description: Cron for scheduling Stratz player updates.

properties.name: ingestion.stratz.sync.historical-start-timestamp
properties.description: Historical start timestamp for Stratz sync.

properties.name: ingestion.stratz.sync.matches-limit
properties.description: Limit of matches per player in a single request.
